hypothesis_note: A moderately polar solvent should support conversion while keeping the run stable.
memory_note: Start from an empty vessel and establish a liquid medium.
reasoning_summary: Charge solvent first so later reagent and catalyst additions satisfy volume preconditions.

hypothesis_note: A conservative reagent charge should keep concentration risk low.
memory_note: Solvent is present; add reactant inventory before catalyst and heat.
reasoning_summary: Add a moderate amount of reactant to create measurable conversion without over-concentrating the vessel.

hypothesis_note: Moderate catalyst loading should improve target pathway rate.
memory_note: Reactant and solvent are present; catalyst is allowed before heating.
reasoning_summary: Use a mid-level catalyst loading to accelerate the target reaction while limiting cost.

hypothesis_note: Moderate heat should produce useful conversion without severe degradation.
memory_note: Catalyst is charged; heat can now advance reaction chemistry.
reasoning_summary: Advance the reaction under controlled temperature and stirring before taking a cheap proxy measurement.

hypothesis_note: UV-vis should expose a low-cost product proxy before endpoint handling.
memory_note: Reaction has been heated; take a public proxy observation before quenching.
reasoning_summary: Use UV-vis as a cheap noisy instrument to update the public belief state without ending the run.

hypothesis_note: Quenching should stop further reaction and reduce degradation risk.
memory_note: A proxy observation has been collected; stop reaction chemistry before final handling.
reasoning_summary: Quench before termination so final assay reflects a controlled endpoint.

hypothesis_note: Termination makes final assay valid under the instrument policy.
memory_note: Reaction is quenched; mark the experiment complete.
reasoning_summary: Terminate the single experiment to satisfy the final assay precondition.

hypothesis_note: Final assay should provide the leaderboard-eligible score.
memory_note: Experiment is terminated; now use the official endpoint instrument.
reasoning_summary: Run final assay after termination to produce a replayable benchmark score.
